HOUSE RULES

This is a hosted, shared environment. Respect for the property, neighbors, and one another ensures a seamless experience for all.

NO OUTSIDE GUESTS ALLOW ON THE PROPERTY WITHOUT APPROVAL. All Guest inquiries must be requested and submitted for approval.
No smoking indoors, including vaping. No exceptions
Do not cause damage to any part of the homes and/or furnishing. You will be liable for any damages you may cause
No music outdoors. No exceptions

Climate

Thermostats preset for comfort
Please do not set below 68°F

Check-Out

Leave keys on kitchen counter
Check-out by 11 AM Sunday
Lost items: contact Concierge

This is a hosted, shared environment. Respect for the property, neighbors, and one another ensures a seamless experience for all.

House Rules

This is a hosted, shared environment. Respect for the property, neighbors, and one another ensures a seamless experience for all.

RESPECT THE PROPERTY, STAFF, AND SURROUNDING NEIGHBORS AT ALL TIMES

SMOKING OR VAPING IS NOT PERMITTED INDOORS

RESIDENTS ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR THEIR CONDUCT AND ANY DAMAGE CAUSED BY THEM OR THEIR APPROVED WORKING STAFF

ACCESS IS LIMITED TO REGISTERED RESIDENTS AND PRE-APPROVED WORKING STAFF ONLY

(Glam, styling, and essential personnel are welcome with prior clearance. Social guests are not permitted.)

OUTDOOR MUSIC IS NOT PERMITTED

INDOOR AUDIO SHOULD REMAIN AT A LEVEL THAT DOES NOT CARRY OUTSIDE

QUIET HOURS ARE OBSERVED FROM 10:00 PM TO 7:00 AM, INCLUDING OUTDOOR AREAS

ROADWAYS MUST REMAIN CLEAR AT ALL TIMES. NO PARKING OR GATHERING

WRISTBANDS ARE REQUIRED AT ALL TIMES. ID MAY BE REQUESTED FOR ACCESS OR SERVICE

ADHERENCE TO THESE GUIDELINES IS REQUIRED TO MAINTAIN ACCESS TO THE COMPOUND

BY STAYING ON PROPERTY, RESIDENTS AGREE TO THESE TERMS

Coachella

KNOW BEFORE YOU GO

Re-sale of passes is strictly prohibited.
There are no refunds or exchanges.
Name changes and alternate pick up names will not be allowed.
Valid photo ID must be presented at time of pickup.
Anyone receiving a credential at will call must have their wristband applied to their wrist at the time of credential pickup, by a member of their credential team.
Wristband is void if tampered with or removed.
GO TO FESTIVAL WEBSITE

Hand Sanitizer / Wipes
Deodorant / Body Wash / Shampoo / Conditioner
Sunscreen / Aloe Vera

Transportation

SHUTTLES TO FESTIVAL

Your house has a dedicated Sprinter for use on the days at Coachella. They will be on property outside your house at 3:00 pm daily unless your house instructs otherwise.


The Sprinters will be dropping you to the Festival in Artist Parking lot 2C.

RETURN SHUTTLES

Sprinters will be staged and ready to go from 10:00 pm in lot 2C to bring you back to the Compound.

DISPATCH

All Compound Sprinters will have the number of your house on the windshield. If you are unable to locate your sprinter, please call dispatch.

CALL DISPATCH
